defect: Remove the public TaxKit export while leaving the implementation present.
recovery: Restore the documented browser-safe TaxKit export and rerun downstream-consumer.

defect: Point the packed root export at an absent artifact.
recovery: Restore the packed root export target and rerun packed-artifact.

defect: Replace the schema-derived OpenAPI paths with an empty document.

mutation.replacement: ({ openapi: "3.1.0", info: { title: "fixture", version: "0" }, paths: {} } as OpenApi.OpenAPISpec);

failureOracle: OpenAPI document did not include the calculate route
recovery: Restore the schema-derived OpenAPI document and rerun api-smoke.

defect: Point one public navigation entry at a missing authored page.
recovery: Restore the authored navigation source and rerun docs-validation.

defect: Replace the canonical CI command in the actual quality job.
recovery: Restore the decoded canonical release command in the actual quality job.

defect: Read candidate evidence from the report-only CI branch.

mutation.replacement:
const candidateEvidence = yield* readReleaseEvidence(workspaceRoot);
    const report = yield* runCiReleaseReadiness(

recovery: Remove candidate evidence reads from CI mode and rerun quality-workflow.
